title: Unidentified spaceport worker

{{Quote|We should go inside. It will be safer.|The spaceport worker, just before being killed|<ref name="Jedi Academy" />}}
A fair-skinned [[Human/Legends|Human]] '''spaceport worker''' with [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] worked in a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Zonju V]].<ref name="Jedi Academy" /> In [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> he gained important information on the [[Disciples of Ragnos]], a [[Sith cult/Legends|cult]] attempting to revive the [[Death/Legends|dead]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Marka Ragnos]]. [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Jaden Korr]] of the [[New Jedi Order]] was [[Mission to Zonju V|sent to meet him]] in an abandoned outpost three [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] outside the Zonju V settlement, [[Zoronhed]]. During their meeting, the spaceport worker was [[Assassin/Legends|assassinated]] by a member of the Disciples of Ragnos before he could tell Korr anything. Korr quickly headed back to [[Far Wanderer|his starship]] before he could be killed as well.<ref name="Jedi Academy" />

==Behind the scenes==
The spaceport worker appeared in the [[Raven Software]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'', released in [[2003]].<ref name="Jedi Academy" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1st}}
